creator: tonym@biolateral.com.au
text:
New port - biology/nclever

	"NClever is a character-based version of NCBI's Entrez program. It
	is an interactive tool that allows easy browsing of the Entrez
	database.
	More information available at:
	WWW: ftp://megasun.bch.umontreal.ca/pub/nclever"

	This software is under GPL licence (COPYING file in the tarball)
